name: @alefdigitalsolutions/openclaw-google-calendar-plugin
author: Louis Ronald
description: OpenClaw Google Calendar plugin scaffold with skills, tools, and plugin metadata.

scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test tests/tool-registration.test.mjs tests/tool-execution.test.mjs tests/google-calendar-gateway.test.mjs tests/google-calendar-auth.test.mjs tests/calendar-date-time-handling.test.mjs tests/confirmation-behavior.test.mjs tests/skill-alignment.test.mjs tests/error-handling.test.mjs tests/repository-validation.test.mjs tests/local-install-docs.test.mjs
